title: Cmdibuzz

body:
![Cmdibuzz Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/123aaade57d938ac715486810488895d4a621849.png)

# Cmdibuzz
## Overview:

Cmdibuzz is a Minecraft Fabric mod (1.20.1) designed to allow server admins/owners to introduce an element of randomisation to commands being run. With Cmdibuzz, servers can define pools of commands which can then be executed in a random fashion for a player.

A use case example for this would be if a server wanted to award a player a random Nature Mint from the Cobblemon mod, as a reward for completing a task.

NB: This mod has no dependency on the Cobblemon mod, or any mod outside of the Fabric API. I only mentioned Cobblemon as an example usecase.

For more information, see the wiki on GitHub.
